data.title: GREEN: Integration test — brainstorm -> preplanning PRECONDITIONS walking skeleton
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## TDD Requirement
Write an integration test that exercises the full brainstorm → preplanning preconditions chain.
This is a structural integration test (per behavioral-testing-standard.md Rule 5 for instruction files),
not a live skill invocation.

## Test Approach (Given / When / Then)
Test: test_brainstorm_to_preplanning_preconditions_chain
  Given: A fixture PRECONDITIONS event file (simulating brainstorm writer output) with:
    - event_type=PRECONDITIONS, gate_name=brainstorm_complete, tier=minimal, all required fields
    - An event_id field (UUID) that downstream events will reference
  When: We run preconditions-validator.sh <ticket_id> brainstorm --event-file=<fixture>
  Then: Exit 0 (valid) — confirms the brainstorm event passes preplanning's entry gate

Test: test_preplanning_exit_emit_and_roundtrip
  Given: A valid brainstorm fixture event and a simulated preplanning PRECONDITIONS event file
    containing upstream_event_id pointing to the brainstorm event's event_id
  When: We run preconditions-validator.sh <ticket_id> preplanning --self-verify=<preplanning-event> --event-file=<preplanning-event>
  Then: Exit 0 (roundtrip self-verification passes) + chain link is present (upstream_event_id field)

Test: test_preplanning_blocked_when_no_brainstorm_event
  Given: No PRECONDITIONS event exists for the brainstorm stage on a ticket
  When: We run preconditions-validator.sh <ticket_id> brainstorm (no --event-file, no live event)
  Then: Exit 2 (not found) — preplanning entry gate would block

## Implementation Notes
- Test file: tests/skills/test-preplanning-preconditions-integration.sh
- This test uses fixture files (inline here-docs), not a live tickets-tracker worktree
- Confirm the test does NOT require Story 1's brainstorm SKILL.md changes to be deployed
  (tests against the validator script and fixture events only)
- This completes the walking skeleton: brainstorm-write → preplanning-read-validate
- Add .test-index entry (not a RED marker — this test passes GREEN after T2+T4)

## File Impact
- CREATE: tests/skills/test-preplanning-preconditions-integration.sh
- MODIFY: .test-index (add entry mapping plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-validator.sh to this test file)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/skills/test-preplanning-preconditions-integration.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-preplanning-preconditions-integration.sh
- [ ] Test file contains all 3 integration test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_brainstorm_to_preplanning_preconditions_chain\|test_preplanning_exit_emit_and_roundtrip\|test_preplanning_blocked_when_no_brainstorm_event' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-preplanning-preconditions-integration.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
- [ ] All integration tests pass GREEN (depends on T2 + T4 being complete)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-preplanning-preconditions-integration.sh
- [ ] Tests use fixture data (no live tickets-tracker or real PRECONDITIONS events required)
  Verify: grep -c 'fixture\|here-doc\|<<\|tmp\|HEREDOC' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-preplanning-preconditions-integration.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 1)}'
- [ ] .test-index entry added mapping plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-validator.sh to tests/skills/test-preplanning-preconditions-integration.sh
  Verify: grep 'preconditions-validator.sh.*test-preplanning-preconditions-integration\|test-preplanning-preconditions-integration.*preconditions-validator' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
